mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quiz_track (title, artist, album_image_url, preview_url, decade, spotify_track_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{artist}, #{albumImageUrl}, #{previewUrl}, #{decade}, #{spotifyTrackId})
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, artist, album_image_url, preview_url, decade, spotify_track_id, created_at FROM quiz_track WHERE decade = #{decade} ORDER BY RANDOM() LIMIT 1
